request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen how our security agencies have been handcuffed by outdated laws. The 2025 National Security Act gives them the tools to stop modern threats like AI-driven disinformation campaigns and cyberattacks on our infrastructure. Some worry about civil liberties, but with proper oversight, this is about keeping America safe. Remember the 2024 power grid hacks? We can't afford to be unprepared again. #NationalSecurityFirst
